'''Veermok''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who ran a secret, illegal facility on [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. The lab contained incriminating evidence about either [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] or [[King/Legends|King]] [[Ars Veruna/Legends|Veruna]]. He was [[Death/Legends|executed]] by [[Sate Pestage/Legends|Sate Pestage]].<ref name="The Monster">{{GamerCite|2|The Monster}}''</ref>
